content.title: What is B3 (Base) about?
content.description: B3 is a Layer 3 blockchain settlement layer built on Base, designed to revolutionize on-chain gaming through its Open Gaming ecosystem. By addressing key pain points in blockchain-based gaming, B3 enhances accessibility for both developers and players. Its infrastructure minimizes transaction costs, simplifies onboarding, and fosters a collaborative ecosystem where games share liquidity, incentives, and audiences.

content.title: What is TON?
content.description: TON (The Open Network) is a Layer 1 smart contract network specializing in financial applications. It was first developed by Telegram’s co-founder Nikolai Durov known as “Telegram Open Network” but has been relaunched as “The Open Network” under the TON Foundation.

content.title: PENGU is the official coin of Pudgy Penguins.
content.description: Pudgy Penguins has become the face of crypto with one of the most influential communities in the industry. From large companies wearing the Penguin, to being featured in ETF commercials, to garnering millions of followers and over 100 billion views, the Pengu has become a cultural icon making PENGU the world’s social currency.

content.title: About Zcash (ZEC)
content.description: Zcash is a privacy-focused cryptocurrency that uses advanced trustless zero-knowledge proofs to enable fully encrypted transactions while maintaining blockchain transparency and security.

content.title: About Bitcoin (BTC)
content.description: Bitcoin is the world's first decentralized cryptocurrency that enables peer-to-peer electronic cash transactions without intermediaries like banks or governments.

content.title: What is FLOCK about?
content.description: FLOCK.io is a decentralized AI model training and validation network designed to break down the walled gardens of model creation and development, making compute, data contribution, and training composable.

content.title: What is CloneX?
content.description: CloneX is a 20,000 collection next-gen Avatars, by RTFKT and Takashi Murakami
